Orange County Basedfrankiejschulte@gmail.com
SELECTED PHOTOGRAPHS
VOLUME 01

Selected Afterimages

Photos

Organized by subject, though never entirely by logic. Enter each sequence as evidence of something already gone—bodies, rooms, and passing light held briefly in place.

01
People / milestonesPortraits & Graduation
02
Gatherings / celebrationsEvents
03
Live music / low lightConcerts
04
Places / observationsPersonal / Travel
